narrative:
Lorain County has 214,522 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.7%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.4% of registrants.
